productDisplayName: Nike Men Grey Lunarfly Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe nike LunarFly +3 Sports shoe is designed for those who love to run. These shoes are ultra light and are ideal for walking and running. These authentic nike shoes are durable and perfect for fitness enthusiasts to use indoors at the sports club and outdoors.Product DetailsSynthetic and mesh upper for lightweight breathable comfort with lushly padded tongue and collar for snug FitCentral lacing for customised fitMesh tongue with textile lined collar for comfortLunarlon technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy returnDynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronationBRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durabilityEPR forefoot for multi-surface tractionWaffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioningMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
